channel.title: Comments on: Hello, the World of Android!

item.title: By: VK
item.dc:creator: VK
item.description:
Hello Gautam..
I feel happy to see your all activities and specially I looked into OCR android integration. I am also android developer and working in Kuwait currently. It's really nice to feel for me to see you as you working. May God keep shower on you forever in life.. My best wishes with you dear. Keep it up and All the best wishes.
Yours, vk hooda
item.content:encoded:
Hello Gautam..

I feel happy to see your all activities and specially I looked into OCR android integration. I am also android developer and working in Kuwait currently. It’s really nice to feel for me to see you as you working. May God keep shower on you forever in life..
My best wishes with you dear. Keep it up and All the best wishes.

Yours,
vk hooda
